title: Sparattosperma fluviatile
taxonomy: Sparattosperma fluviatile is a species of flowering plant in the family Bignoniaceae. It is native to the tropical regions of Central and South America. The classification of Sparattosperma fluviatile is as follows: kingdom - Plantae, phylum - Magnoliophyta, class - Magnoliopsida, order - Lamiales, family - Bignoniaceae, genus - Sparattosperma, species - S. fluviatile. This plant is a member of the Bignoniaceae family, which consists of about 800 species of woody vines, shrubs, and trees. Sparattosperma fluviatile is further classified into the family Bignoniaceae and the order Lamiales.
